---
title: "Бюллетень: торговля с Индией"
subtitle: "Ежемесячный выпуск"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: ""
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    fig-align: center
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Sans+Pro:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
          <style>
            body, .quarto-title-banner, main#quarto-document-content {
              font-family: "Source Sans Pro", sans-serif;
            }
          </style>
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 11,
  fig.height = 7
)

library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(plotly)
library(stringi)
library(showtext)
library(sysfonts)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)

font_add_google("Source Sans 3", "ssp")
showtext_auto()

clean_legend_plotly <- function(p){
  for (i in 1:length(p$x$data)) {
    if (!is.null(p$x$data[[i]]$name)) {
      p$x$data[[i]]$name <- str_extract(p$x$data[[i]]$name, "(?<=\\()[^,]*(?=,)")
    }
  }
  p
}

mgimo_colors <- c(
  primary    = "#003d7a",
  secondary  = "#e74c3c",
  accent1    = "#27ae60",
  accent2    = "#3498db",
  accent3    = "#f39c12",
  text       = "#2c3e50",
  light_bg   = "#f8f9fa"
)

site_bg <- mgimo_colors[["light_bg"]]

theme_groups <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18, base_family = "ssp") +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = site_bg, colour = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = site_bg, colour = NA),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = NA, fill = NA),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, color = "grey40", family = "ssp")
    )
}

patch_ggbreak_svg <- function(path, bg = site_bg) {
  bg <- toupper(bg)
  svg <- readLines(path, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")
  svg <- gsub("#FFFFFF", bg, svg, fixed = TRUE)
  svg <- gsub("#EBEBEB", bg, svg, fixed = TRUE)
  svg <- gsub(
    'font-family: "[^"]+"',
    'font-family: "Source Sans Pro"',
    svg,
    perl = TRUE
  )
  writeLines(svg, path, useBytes = TRUE)
}

trade_balance <- read_parquet("data/trade_balance_india.parquet")
df_groups <- read_parquet("data/data_4_india.parquet")
data_oil <- read_parquet("data/data_oil_export_india.parquet")

date_min <- min(trade_balance$PERIOD)
date_max <- max(trade_balance$PERIOD)
report_month <- stri_datetime_format(date_max, format = "LLLL yyyy", locale = "ru")

pl_trade_balance <-
  trade_balance %>%
  mutate(
    `Стоимость, млрд долл.` = round(STOIM / 10^9, 1),
    Показатель = case_when(
      NAPR == "ЭК" ~ "Экспорт",
      NAPR == "ИМ" ~ "Импорт",
      NAPR == "ТБ" ~ "Торговый баланс"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(Дата = PERIOD) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_col(
    data = ~ filter(.x, Показатель == "Торговый баланс"),
    aes(Дата, `Стоимость, млрд долл.`, fill = Показатель)
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = ~ filter(.x, Показатель != "Торговый баланс"),
    aes(Дата, `Стоимость, млрд долл.`, color = Показатель),
    linewidth = I(1)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Экспорт" = mgimo_colors[["secondary"]], "Импорт" = mgimo_colors[["primary"]]),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Торговый баланс" = mgimo_colors[["accent1"]]),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(date_min, date_max, by = "year"),
    labels = scales::label_date("%Y")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13, base_family = "ssp") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(1.1, "cm"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )

pl_oil_export <-
  data_oil %>%
  mutate(`Экспорт, млн т` = round(NETTO, 1)) %>%
  rename(Дата = PERIOD) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Дата, y = `Экспорт, млн т`)) +
  geom_line(color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]], linewidth = I(1)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, fill = "white", color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]]) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(date_min, date_max, by = "year"),
    labels = scales::label_date("%Y")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13, base_family = "ssp") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

## В этом выпуске

* Данные за **`r report_month`**;
* Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit;
* Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua;
* Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris.

## 1. Импорт, экспорт и торговый баланс

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Pellentesque habitant morbi tristique senectus et netus.

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Импорт, экспорт и торговый баланс торговли с Индией, млрд $."
ggplotly(pl_trade_balance, dynamicTicks = FALSE) %>%
  layout(
    font = list(family = "Source Sans Pro", size = 13),
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h",
      x = 0.5,
      xanchor = "center",
      y = -0.08,
      font = list(family = "Source Sans Pro", size = 13)
    )
  ) %>%
  clean_legend_plotly()
```

**Главное:**

- Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
- Vestibulum ante ipsum primis in faucibus orci luctus et ultrices posuere cubilia curae.
- Integer nec odio praesent libero sed cursus ante dapibus diam.

## 2. Экспорт нефти

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Maecenas sed diam eget risus varius blandit.

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Экспорт нефти в Индию в натуральном выражении, млн т."
ggplotly(pl_oil_export, dynamicTicks = FALSE) %>%
  layout(
    font = list(family = "Source Sans Pro", size = 13)
  )
```

**Главное:**

- Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
- Cras ultricies mi eu turpis hendrerit fringilla.
- Donec pede justo, fringilla vel, aliquet nec, vulputate eget, arcu.

## 3. Торговля помимо сырой нефти

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Топ-12 товарных позиций экспорта и импорта по изменению стоимости за 12 месяцев. Зелёный сегмент — рост, красный — снижение."
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8

plot_export <- df_groups %>%
  filter(NAPR == "ЭК", TNVED4 != "2709") %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(STOIM_last12, STOIM_year_before, STOIM_diff), ~ .x * 1000),
    STOIM_diff_abs = abs(STOIM_diff),
    type = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, "positive", "negative"),
    position_label = (STOIM_last12 + STOIM_year_before) / 2,
    label = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, paste0("+", round(STOIM_diff, 1)), paste0(round(STOIM_diff, 1)))
  ) %>%
  arrange(-STOIM_diff_abs) %>%
  head(12) %>%
  mutate(TNVED4_string = fct_reorder(TNVED4_string, STOIM_last12)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(color = type)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = STOIM_year_before, xend = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string, yend = TNVED4_string)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string), fill = site_bg, shape = 21) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(mgimo_colors[["accent1"]], mgimo_colors[["secondary"]]),
    breaks = c("positive", "negative")
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(x = position_label, y = TNVED4_string, label = label), nudge_y = 0.41, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_groups() +
  labs(y = NULL,
       x = "млн долл.",
       title = 'Экспорт')

plot_import <- df_groups %>%
  filter(NAPR == "ИМ") %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(STOIM_last12, STOIM_year_before, STOIM_diff), ~ .x * 1000),
    STOIM_diff_abs = abs(STOIM_diff),
    type = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, "positive", "negative"),
    position_label = (STOIM_last12 + STOIM_year_before) / 2,
    label = if_else(STOIM_diff > 0, paste0("+", round(STOIM_diff, 1)), paste0(round(STOIM_diff, 1)))
  ) %>%
  arrange(-STOIM_diff_abs) %>%
  head(12) %>%
  mutate(TNVED4_string = fct_reorder(TNVED4_string, STOIM_last12)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(color = type)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = STOIM_year_before, xend = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string, yend = TNVED4_string)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = STOIM_last12, y = TNVED4_string), fill = site_bg, shape = 21) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(mgimo_colors[["accent1"]], mgimo_colors[["secondary"]]),
    breaks = c("positive", "negative")
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(x = position_label, y = TNVED4_string, label = label), nudge_y = 0.41, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_groups() +
  labs(y = NULL,
       x = "млн долл.",
       title = 'Импорт')

title_box_theme <- theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(
      size = 18,
      face = "bold",
      family = 'ssp',
      color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]],
      halign = 0.05,
      padding = margin(4, 10, 4, 10),
      margin = margin(0, 0, 6, r = 0),
      fill = 'transparent',
      box.color = mgimo_colors[["primary"]],
      linewidth = 2,
      r = unit(6, "pt")
  )
  )

groups_ft <- (plot_export + title_box_theme) / (plot_import + title_box_theme)

fig_dir <- knitr::opts_chunk$get("fig.path")
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
fig_ft <- file.path(fig_dir, "groups-ft.svg")
ggsave(fig_ft, plot = groups_ft, width = 10, height = 8, device = svglite::svglite, bg = site_bg)
patch_ggbreak_svg(fig_ft)
knitr::include_graphics(fig_ft)
```

**Главное:**

- Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
- Nulla consequat massa quis enim.
- Curabitur ullamcorper ultricies nisi.
